This role is ideal for a high-<br><br> </div><div>performing individual contributor who thrives on closing deals, building strong client<br><br> </div><div>relationships, and consistently exceeding targets.<br><br> </div><div>You will own the full sales cycle—from prospecting to closing—while collaborating closely<br><br> </div><div>with marketing, product, and customer success teams to deliver long-term customer<br><br> </div><div>value. This role requires strong SaaS sales expertise, consultative selling skills, and the<br><br> </div><div>ability to operate in a fast-scaling, performance-focused environment.<br><br> </div><div>Key Responsibilities<br><br> </div><div>Revenue &amp; Pipeline Growth<br><br> </div><div>* Drive new business acquisition across the US SaaS market.<br><br> </div><div>* Manage the full sales cycle: prospecting, discovery, demos, negotiation, and<br><br> </div><div>closing.<br><br> </div><div>* Consistently achieve and exceed monthly, quarterly, and annual revenue targets.<br><br> </div><div>* Maintain a strong, predictable pipeline of qualified opportunities.<br><br> </div><div>Client Engagement<br><br> </div><div>* Build trusted relationships with decision-makers and senior stakeholders.<br><br> </div><div>* Understand client pain points and position solutions through consultative selling.<br><br> </div><div>* Lead product demonstrations and tailored proposals.<br><br> </div><div>Strategy &amp; Market Execution<br><br> </div><div>* Execute go-to-market strategies within assigned segments or territories.<br><br> </div><div>* Identify emerging opportunities and contribute insights on market trends.<br><br> </div><div>* Collaborate with marketing on outbound campaigns and lead generation initiatives.<br><br> </div><div>Cross-Functional Collaboration<br><br> </div><div>* Partner with Customer Success to ensure smooth onboarding and retention.<br><br> </div><div>* Provide customer feedback to Product teams to improve offerings.<br><br> </div><div>* Work closely with Sales leadership on forecasting and performance planning.<br><br> </div><div>Sales Operations<br><br> </div><div>* Maintain accurate CRM records and pipeline hygiene.<br><br> </div><div>* Deliver reliable forecasts and sales reports.<br><br> </div><div>* Use data and metrics to optimize conversion and deal velocity.<br><br> </div><div>Qualifications<br><br> </div><div>* 5+ years of SaaS sales experience in the US market.<br><br> </div><div>* Proven track record of exceeding B2B sales quotas.<br><br> </div><div>* Strong experience managing full-cycle SaaS sales.<br><br> </div><div>* Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills.<br><br> </div><div>* Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, target-driven environment.<br><br> </div><div>* Proficiency in CRM platforms (Salesforce, HubSpot, or similar).<br><br> </div><div>* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, or related field preferred.<br><br> </div><div>&nbsp;</div> </div> <p>This is a remote position.</p> <div class="job-compensation"> Compensation: $100,000.00 per year </div> <br><br><br> <div class="account_description"> <h1>About Us</h1> <div><strong>AHU Technologies INC. </strong>is an IT consulting and permanent staffing firm that meets and exceeds the evolving IT service needs of leading corporations within the United States.
